the analysis is appropriate.\n\n5. **Overall Assessment:**\n   - The code is a simple, static message definition module.\n   - No malicious activity, security risks, or obfuscation are present.\n   - The scores assigned in all reports are reasonable and justified.\n\n**Final Recommendations:**\n- Based on the evidence, I agree with the provided assessments.\n- The malware, obfuscated, and security risk scores should remain at 0.\n- The confidence score of 1 is appropriate.\n\n**Summary:**\n- The code is benign, with no malicious or security concerns.\n- The reports are accurate and consistent.\n- No changes to scores or conclusions are necessary.\n\n**Conclusion:**\nThis is a straightforward, safe module exporting static error messages with no malicious or security issues detected.",
